description_for_human: Open-source TypeScript framework for building PumpFun Telegram bots on Solana — monitoring, alerts, tracking, and analytics.
description_for_model: PumpKit is an open-source TypeScript framework for building production-ready PumpFun Telegram bots on Solana. It provides Grammy bot scaffolding, real-time Solana event monitors (fee claims, token launches, graduations, whale trades, CTO alerts, fee distributions), HTML message formatters, SQLite storage, REST APIs, webhooks, health checks, and Docker/Railway deployment configs. Packages: @pumpkit/core (shared framework), @pumpkit/monitor (all-in-one monitor bot), @pumpkit/tracker (call tracking + leaderboards), @pumpkit/channel (read-only channel feed), @pumpkit/claim (fee claim tracker).
